narrative.headline: 2022 Kia Forte: engine and forward collision avoidance lead a small set of complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 24 complaints with NHTSA. Engine and forward collision avoidance are tied at the top, each with 4 reports (17%), followed by steering and suspension at 3 reports each (13%). No fires or deaths are reported. The few crashes and the one injury are tied to forward collision avoidance and steering, so those two are worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.sample: The contact owns a 2022 Kia Forte. The contact stated while his son was driving 5 MPH, the engine seized. A message indicating that the vehicle was off and to restart the vehicle was displayed. The contact’s son veered to the side of the road. The contact’s son was able to restar
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Tied for the most reported: 4 reports (17%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. One owner describes the engine seizing at low speed. Watch for stalling or sudden loss of power.

issues.sample: Hi, On multiple occasions, the car slams on brakes in the middle of traffic, its like it has a mind of its own, I can back up and a car can be passing by all the way across the street and the car will beep and slam on brakes, sometimes while I'm driving and may not be close to a
issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: Tied for the most reported: 4 reports (17%), and the only area with an injury (1), plus 1 crash. Owners describe the system braking on its own in traffic. Test the automatic braking behavior carefully.

issues.sample: I got into an accident i On December 10th, 2023 my car was totaled out. My steering wheel felt like it was doing its own thing and I crashed straight into a curb and some rocks. I was injured and they had just fixed my steering because of the recall but I don’t know if they did i
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: 3 reports (13%), including 1 crash. One owner describes the wheel acting on its own and a related recall repair. Pay attention to how the steering tracks on a test drive.

issues.title: Suspension
issues.blurb: 3 reports (13%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. One owner reports a front lower control arm fracturing during normal driving. A smaller but recurring complaint area.

issues.sample: I keep shutting down, not going on something with a forward assist on top of that. I have no control over my car does whatever ones and it’s very unstable Fawzy no control is very unstable very bumpy road to the point I don’t even wanna drive
issues.title: Seat Belts
issues.blurb: The fewest at 2 reports (8%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. The smallest complaint area for this model year.
